summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of new bottom pill navbar implementation in Ticksy attendance tracking app. All navigation features working perfectly with proper active state visual effects.
passed_tests: Login with demo@ticksy.app / Demo1234! redirects to /dashboard
Bottom pill navbar visible on dashboard with 5 icons (students, home, add, calendar, profile)
nav-profile navigates to /profile page with email displayed
Active nav icon shows pop-out visual effect (elevated above bar)
Profile page displays user email (demo@ticksy.app) and Log Out button
Logout from profile page redirects to landing page
Students page shows Add Student button and existing students
Slots page shows Add Slot button and existing Wednesday slots
Calendar page shows student selector dropdown and calendar component
Calendar component renders properly after selecting student with stats and legend
Bottom navbar consistently visible across all pages
All existing CRUD functionality preserved with new navbar
Deep blue rounded navbar design (#1a2f7a) fixed at bottom as specified
Center + icon (nav-add) has proper special styling
Force clicks work correctly due to Emergent badge overlap handling
